project.title: Wasteland Survivors
project.description: Post-apocalyptic survival game set in ruined cities overtaken by mutated wildlife.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, muted desaturated palette with rust and toxic green accents, thick readable silhouettes

assets.name: mutant_boar
assets.description: mutated war boar with armored skull plate, glowing green tusks, rusted chain collar, scarred hide. FULL BODY including hooves and tail, centered with generous white margin, side view facing right, neutral standing pose, non-aggressive

assets.name: mutant_boar_idle
assets.action: subtle idle breathing, slight chest rise, ear twitch, tail micro-sway, standing in place, loopable, side view facing right
